name: Abu Nayim Faisal
bio: Met during our undergrad at BUET. Currently working as a senior developer and always has great career advice.

name: Nadia Sultana Chowdhury
bio: A brilliant architect whom I've known since high school. We share a common interest in modern structural designs.

name: Ariful Haque Siddique
bio: Former teammate at my first tech job. He’s now leading an engineering team and we often discuss new frameworks.

name: Mehnaz Perveen Rakhi
bio: My childhood friend who is now a practicing physician. She’s extremely busy but always makes time for a monthly catch-up.

name: Shahadat Hossain Bhuiyan
bio: A professional mentor who guided me through my early project management challenges. Currently staying in Chittagong.

name: Sadia Afrin Shanta
bio: Met during a climate change awareness event. She is very passionate about community development and environmental policy.

name: Tanvir Ahmed Khan
bio: Met in college and now running a successful tech startup. We catch up frequently to discuss entrepreneurial ideas.

name: Nusrat Jahan Mim
bio: A talented graphic designer and a long-time friend. We usually talk about art, branding, and latest design trends.
